summary: Iteration 28 frontend-only verification of TopoMobile fix on inscricao-pagamento.html and inscricao-comprovante.html. Tested at mobile 412x915, print-media emulation, and desktop 1280x800. All 5 acceptance criteria pass.

inscricao-passo3.html.note: Pre-existing - element exists but hidden on mobile. Out of scope for this iteration.

inscricao-pagamento.html.note: On desktop, the injected <header id=TopoMobile> renders as the original full header with menu items, matching expected original-style behavior

inscricao-comprovante.html.note: Same as pagamento - original desktop header layout, no regression

action_items: (Optional) Investigate why passo3 TopoMobile is display:none on mobile - may be a separate pre-existing issue not in iteration 28 scope, surfaced for awareness only.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile-override CSS rules for #TopoMobile in pagamento/comprovante are not wrapped in a max-width media query, so on desktop they would compete with the original styles. Currently desktop falls back to display:block (original layout), but consider gating the mobile overrides with @media (max-width: 768px) for clarity and to avoid future specificity issues.
Duplicate header HTML (large base64 logo) copied across 4 HTML files - DRY violation. Consider extracting via a shared script/include for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: localStorage seed via page.evaluate before navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 confirmed: pagamento.html and comprovante.html now have #TopoMobile rendering at 77px height with 109x60 Agata logo on mobile 412px; comprovante hides #TopoMobile under @media print; desktop 1280px shows no horizontal overflow on any of the 5 pages. Pre-existing observation (not in iteration 28 scope): inscricao-passo3.html has #TopoMobile in DOM but computed display:none on mobile - flag this if a future iteration extends the fix to passo3.
rca of the issue: N/A - this was a regression-style verification iteration. Fix from iteration 27 (injecting <header id=TopoMobile> markup with Agata logo into pagamento.html and comprovante.html, plus @media print rule on comprovante) is verified working.
